questionHtml: Analysis of the data suggests that the number of deaths from EVD is not related to the total population size. State one piece of evidence from the data that would support this analysis.
markschemeHtml:
country with biggest population/Mali has lowest number of deaths
OR
country with smallest population/Liberia has biggest number of deaths ✔

OWTTE
